title: alchemilla coriacea var. demissa
intro: Alchemilla coriacea var. demissa, also known as the alpine lady's mantle, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating digestive problems, among others. Alchemilla coriacea var. demissa can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to the affected areas.
